problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: Combining Shape memory alloy phase transition with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
